details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 50-min online anxiety session (next 7 days, 7pm+)
Task 2: Register weekend stress workshop under $80 (>=90 mins) and add to cart
Task 3: Choose cheapest >=4 sessions chat-support plan under $200 with monthly billing
Task 4: Complete new client intake form (anxiety & sleep)
Task 5: Save up to first three short work-related burnout articles to reading list
Task 6: Start <=10min manage-panic breathing exercise and add to favorites
Task 7: Contact an online coach via secure portal message
Task 8: Reschedule soonest upcoming appointment to new 7:00 pm slot two days later (best-effort)
Task 9: Build cart with 4 individual 50-min sessions and 1 workshop (combined <= $400)
